hooks.command: if [ ! -f /tmp/claude-code-modified ] || ! git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(py|toml|cfg)$'; then exit 0; fi; uv run ruff check --fix . 2>&1; uv run ruff format . 2>&1; if ! uv run ruff check . > /tmp/ruff-errors.log 2>&1; then echo '=== LINT ERRORS: fix the issues below and I will re-run the pipeline ==='; cat /tmp/ruff-errors.log; rm -f /tmp/claude-code-modified; exit 2; fi; rm -f /tmp/claude-code-modified
